message:
feat(secrets): add incremental scan with checkpoint/resume and schema v13 migration

Extend secret scanning to support incremental resume from prior checkpoints:

secrets.rs:
- Add SecretScanScope struct for filter serialization (pane_id, since, until)
- Expand SecretScanReport with report_version, scope, timestamps, and
  resume_after_id/last_segment_id checkpoint fields
- Add scan_storage_incremental() that loads latest checkpoint by scope hash,
  resumes from last_segment_id, and persists new report
- Factor out scan_storage_from() internal implementation
- Add hash_bytes() helper for scope hashing

storage.rs (schema v13):
- Add secret_scan_reports table with scope_hash, scope_json, report_version,
  last_segment_id checkpoint, report_json payload, and created_at
- Add idx_secret_scan_reports_scope index for efficient checkpoint lookup
- Add SecretScanReportRecord struct for typed record handling
- Add record_secret_scan_report() and latest_secret_scan_report() methods
- Add WriteCommand::RecordSecretScanReport variant
- Add secret_scan_report_roundtrip test
- Fix search_suggestion_prefix to use split_whitespace().next_back()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
